parameters.query:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC($3, p.payment_date) AS periodo,
  p.source_currency AS currency,
  SUM(p.amount_applied) AS total_cobrado,
  COUNT(p.id) AS num_cobros,
  AVG(p.amount_applied) AS promedio
FROM payments p
WHERE p.payment_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND p.is_sales = true
  AND p.status = 'completed'
  AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR p.source_currency = $4::varchar)
GROUP BY periodo, currency
ORDER BY periodo DESC

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(i.created_at, 'YYYY-MM') AS mes,
  i.currency,
  SUM(i.total) AS total_facturado,
  SUM(i.paid_amount) AS total_cobrado,
  SUM(i.total - i.paid_amount) AS pendiente,
  ROUND(SUM(i.paid_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(i.total), 0) * 100, 1) AS pct_cobrado
FROM invoices i
WHERE i.is_sales = true
  AND i.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $3::varchar)
GROUP BY mes, i.currency
ORDER BY mes DESC

WITH invoice_aging AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    SUM(i.total - i.paid_amount) AS total_debt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 0 AND 30
             THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) AS bucket_0_30,
    SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 31 AND 60
             THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) AS bucket_31_60,
    SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 61 AND 90
             THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) AS bucket_61_90,
    SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date > 90
             THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) AS bucket_90_plus
  FROM invoices i
  WHERE i.is_sales = true
    AND i.status = 'booked'
    AND i.currency = $1::varchar
    AND i.payment_state IN ('unpaid', 'partially_paid')
  GROUP BY i.user_id
  HAVING SUM(i.total - i.paid_amount) > COALESCE($2::numeric, 0)
    AND (
      $3::text = 'all'
      OR ($3::text = '0-30'  AND SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 0  AND 30 THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) > 0)
      OR ($3::text = '31-60' AND SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) > 0)
      OR ($3::text = '61-90' AND SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) > 0)
      OR ($3::text = '+90'   AND SUM(CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date > 90 THEN i.total - i.paid_amount ELSE 0 END) > 0)
    )
)
SELECT
  u.id,
  u.name AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  u.email,
  ia.total_debt,
  ia.bucket_0_30,
  ia.bucket_31_60,
  ia.bucket_61_90,
  ia.bucket_90_plus
FROM invoice_aging ia
JOIN users u ON u.id = ia.user_id
ORDER BY ia.total_debt DESC

WITH billing AS (
  SELECT
    ii.service_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.id)             AS num_facturas,
    COALESCE(SUM(ii.total), 0)       AS total_facturado,
    COALESCE(AVG(ii.unit_price), 0)  AS precio_promedio
  FROM invoice_items ii
  JOIN invoices i ON i.id = ii.invoice_id
    AND i.is_sales = true
    AND i.status = 'booked'
    AND i.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
    AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $4::varchar)
  WHERE ii.service_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY ii.service_id
),
quoting AS (
  SELECT
    qi.service_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS num_presupuestos
  FROM quote_items qi
  JOIN quotes q ON q.id = qi.quote_id
    AND q.is_sales = true
    AND q.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
    AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR q.currency = $4::varchar)
  WHERE qi.service_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY qi.service_id
),
sesiones AS (
  SELECT
    asc2.service_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT asc2.appointment_id) AS num_sesiones
  FROM appointment_service_catalog asc2
  JOIN appointments a ON a.id = asc2.appointment_id
    AND a.start_datetime::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
    AND a.status IN ('completed', 'confirmed')
  GROUP BY asc2.service_id
),
tratamientos AS (
  SELECT
    ts.service_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ts.id) AS num_tratamientos
  FROM treatment_sequences ts
  WHERE ts.started_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  GROUP BY ts.service_id
)
SELECT
  sc.id,
  sc.name                               AS service_name,
  COALESCE(sc.category, 'Sin categoría') AS category,
  COALESCE(sc.service_type, 'single')    AS service_type,
  COALESCE(b.num_facturas,      0)::int  AS num_facturas,
  COALESCE(b.total_facturado,   0)       AS total_facturado,
  COALESCE(b.precio_promedio,   0)       AS precio_promedio,
  COALESCE(q.num_presupuestos,  0)::int  AS num_presupuestos,
  COALESCE(s.num_sesiones,      0)::int  AS num_sesiones,
  COALESCE(t.num_tratamientos,  0)::int  AS num_tratamientos
FROM service_catalog sc
LEFT JOIN billing     b ON b.service_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN quoting     q ON q.service_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN sesiones    s ON s.service_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN tratamientos t ON t.service_id = sc.id
WHERE (
  COALESCE(b.num_facturas,    0) > 0
  OR COALESCE(q.num_presupuestos, 0) > 0
  OR COALESCE(s.num_sesiones,     0) > 0
  OR COALESCE(t.num_tratamientos, 0) > 0
)
  AND (
    $3::text = 'all'
    OR ($3::text = 'flow'   AND sc.service_type = 'workflow')
    OR ($3::text = 'single' AND sc.service_type = 'single')
  )
ORDER BY total_facturado DESC NULLS LAST, num_sesiones DESC
